name: chat2skill
description: Automatically learn coding-agent memory and skills through stateless Chat2Skill extraction and retrieve local context from c2s.db.

interface.shortDescription: Learn and retrieve memory and skills from agent conversations.
interface.longDescription: Chat2Skill captures conversations after each session, sends a compact current transcript plus locally retrieved top-K context to the stateless Chat2Skill learn API, stores returned memory and skills in ~/.chat2skill/c2s.db, and injects relevant local project memory plus skills into new conversations without cloud retrieval. Codex keeps the non-blocking Stop learning hook but does not register the blocking response guard.
defaultPrompt: Use Chat2Skill to retrieve relevant learned skills for this task.
Update Chat2Skill from the latest session.
Show me where Chat2Skill stored my generated skills.
